nodes.name: Read Content Calendar
nodes.notes: Reads Google Sheets Content Calendar for blog posts marked 'ready_to_convert'

messages.content: You are a content repurposing expert for ScoreMyPrompt, an AI prompt grading tool. Convert blog content into platform-specific formats.

Convert this blog post into 7 platform-specific pieces:

1. X thread (5-7 tweets, each under 280 chars, with hooks and hashtags)
2. LinkedIn post (professional tone, 1300 chars max, with CTA)
3. Bluesky post (casual tone, 300 chars, with link)
4. Reddit post (educational, no self-promotion feel, for r/PromptEngineering)
5. YouTube community post (conversational, with question for engagement)
6. Instagram caption (with emojis and 20 hashtags)
7. TikTok script (30-60 second hook + value + CTA)

Blog title: {{ $json.title }}
Blog content: {{ $json.content }}

Output as JSON with keys: x_thread, linkedin, bluesky, reddit, youtube, instagram, tiktok

nodes.name: Groq: Convert to 7 Formats
nodes.notes: Tier 1: Groq 70B free API — blog → 7 platform drafts

json.prompt: Generate 15 relevant hashtags for this content about AI prompt engineering. Topic: {{ $json.title }}. Return only hashtags separated by spaces.

nodes.name: Ollama: Generate Hashtags
nodes.notes: Tier 2: Ollama 3B local — hashtag generation (fast, free)

nodes.name: Update Calendar: Drafts Ready
nodes.notes: Updates Content Calendar status from 'ready_to_convert' to 'draft_ready' with all 7 format drafts

parameters.text:
📝 Content Pack Ready!

Blog: {{ $json.title }}
✅ 7 platform drafts generated
✅ Hashtags added

→ Review in Google Sheets Content Calendar

nodes.name: Notify: Pack Ready
nodes.notes: Optional: Slack notification. Remove if not using Slack.

meta.description: WF-1: Blog → Multi-Platform Content Repurposing (1→7+ pieces). Uses Groq 70B for drafts + Ollama 3B for hashtags. Packing Assistant model: prepares drafts, human reviews and publishes natively.
